mapper.sql: id, username, `password`, nickname, avatar, gender, birth, intro, created_at
mapper.insert:
insert into users
username,
`password`,
nickname,
avatar,
gender,
birth,
intro,
created_at,
#{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{gender,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{birth,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{intro,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update users
username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`password` = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
nickname = #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
avatar = #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
gender = #{gender,jdbcType=INTEGER},
birth = #{birth,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
intro = #{intro,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update users set username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `password` = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nickname = #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, avatar = #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, gender = #{gender,jdbcType=INTEGER}, birth = #{birth,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, intro = #{intro,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
